mapper.select: SELECT id, user_account, student_no, real_name, age, gender, email, phone, major, advisor, grade, study_status, enroll_date, graduate_date, gpa, record_create_time FROM user ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, user_account, student_no, real_name, age, gender, email, phone, major, advisor, grade, study_status, enroll_date, graduate_date, gpa, record_create_time FROM user WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_account, student_no, real_name, age, gender, email, phone, major, advisor, grade, study_status, enroll_date, graduate_date, gpa, record_create_time FROM user WHERE student_no = #{studentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET user_account = #{username}, student_no = #{studentId}, real_name = #{name}, age = #{age}, gender = #{gender}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, major = #{major}, advisor = #{advisor}, grade = #{grade}, study_status = #{status}, enroll_date = #{enrollmentDate}, graduate_date = #{expectedGraduation}, gpa = #{gpa}, record_create_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
